description_long: This object is a freestanding advertising board with a rectangular metal frame structure and a large, flat display panel mounted at the back. The frame is constructed from thin, black metal tubing, forming a box-like base that provides stability and support. The display panel features a printed advertisement for AutoFair, promoting over 3,000 vehicles in stock, with logos of car brands such as Honda, Ford, and Hyundai. The advertisement is visually prominent, with bold red and green text and a white background, making it easily readable from a distance. The open frame design leaves the lower section empty, allowing visibility through the structure and minimizing visual obstruction. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A freestanding metal advertising board with a large printed AutoFair vehicle promotion and an open rectangular frame base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full advertisement panel with AutoFair branding and car logos, supported by a black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the display panel and the depth of the supporting frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backside of the panel and the open, box-like frame with no visible advertisement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the frame's depth and the panel's thinness.
attribute_frame_design: thin black metal tubular frame with rectangular geometry
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for AutoFair vehicle dealership with brand logos and promotional text
